heading: Find Atlas in Azure
body:
If you are an Azure (Microsoft Azure) user with any role, you can discover Atlas through the following methods:

- Search for MongoDB Atlas using the search bar in the Azure (Microsoft Azure) dashboard and view Atlas
  under **Services** and **Marketplace** in the search results.

  ![Azure search bar image for navigating MongoDB Atlas](/reference/images/azure-native-isv-service-searchbar.png)

- Navigate to **All services**, then to **Databases**, from which you can select
  **MongoDB Atlas**.

  ![Azure databases page for navigating MongoDB Atlas](/reference/images/azure-native-isv-service-databases-page.png)

- Navigate to **Marketplace**, then to **Databases**, from which you can select
  **MongoDB Atlas**.
